goal_text:
You are planning your trip in Cambridge.
You are looking for a place to stay. The hotel should be in the 'east' and should have 'a star of 4'.
The hotel should be in the 'cheap' price range and 'doesn't need to have free parking'.
If there is no such hotel, how about one that has 'free parking'.
Make sure you get 'whether they have internet', 'phone number', and 'hotel type'.
You are also looking for a place to dine. The restaurant should serve 'asian oriental' food and should be in the 'same price range as the hotel'.
Make sure you get 'area' and 'postcode'.
You also want to book a 'taxi' to commute between the two places.
You want to leave the 'hotel' by '07:30'.
Make sure you get 'contact number' and 'car type'.Remember. You don't want booking for restaurant. Just get the information and it all done.
Remember. You don't want booking for accomodation. Just get the information and it all done.

book.destination: restaurant that the user will book
book.departure: accommodation that the user will book

message: You are planning your trip in Cambridge
You are looking for a place to stay. The hotel should be in the east and should have a star of 4
The hotel should be in the cheap price range and doesn't need to have free parking
If there is no such hotel, how about one that has free parking
Make sure you get whether they have internet, phone number, and hotel type
You are also looking for a place to dine. The restaurant should serve asian oriental food and should be in the same price range as the hotel
Make sure you get area and postcode
You also want to book a taxi to commute between the two places
You want to leave the hotel by 07:30
Make sure you get contact number and car type
